entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS AROUND 50

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
